title: Zettle Transaction
description: A financial transaction in a merchant's Zettle preliminary or liquid account.

timestamp.description: The time when the transaction is made in the merchant's Zettle account (UTC).

amount.description: The amount of the transaction in the currency's smallest unit. Can be negative for refunds.

originatorTransactionType.description: The type of the originating transaction.

originatorTransactionUuid.description: The UUID v1 identifier of the originating transaction.
